main.name: Iron Man, Titan of Innovation
main.oracle_text:
Flying, haste
Genius Industrialist — Whenever Iron Man attacks, create a Treasure token, then you may sacrifice a noncreature artifact. If you do, search your library for an artifact card with mana value equal to 1 plus the sacrificed artifact's mana value, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Emry, Lurker of the Loch
card.oracle_text:
Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.)
When Emry enters, mill four cards.
{T}: Choose target artifact card in your graveyard. You may cast that card this turn. (You still pay its costs. Timing rules still apply.)

card.name: Elixir of Immortality
card.oracle_text: {2}, {T}: You gain 5 life. Shuffle this artifact and your graveyard into their owner's library.
card.flavor_text:
"Bottled life. Not as tasty as I'm used to, rather stale, but it has the same effect."
—Baron Sengir

card.name: Metallic Rebuke
card.oracle_text:
Improvise (Your artifacts can help cast this spell. Each artifact you tap after you're done activating mana abilities pays for {1}.)
Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.
card.flavor_text:
"Too little, too late. The machine is in motion."
—Tezzeret

card.name: Thoughtcast
card.oracle_text:
Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.)
Draw two cards.
card.flavor_text: Vedalken eyes don't see the beauty in things. They see only what those things can teach.

card.name: Trinket Mage
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for an artifact card with mana value 1 or less, reveal that card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Solemn Simulacrum
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may draw a card.

card.name: Mycosynth Wellspring
card.oracle_text: When this artifact enters or is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: The oil created the mycosynth. The mycosynth created New Phyrexia.

card.name: Magnetic Theft
card.oracle_text: Attach target Equipment to target creature. (Control of the Equipment doesn't change.)
card.flavor_text: Among the Vulshok, the most prized blades are those that killed their original owners.

card.name: Misty Rainforest
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Grindstone
card.oracle_text: {3}, {T}: Target player mills two cards. If two cards that share a color were milled this way, repeat this process.
card.flavor_text:
"Memory is a burden that wears at the soul as weather wears at stone."
—Crovax

card.name: Talisman of Creativity
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}. This artifact deals 1 damage to you.
card.flavor_text:
"Good ideas don't take time. They take a lot of bad ideas first."
—Ral Zarek

card.name: Steam Vents
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {U} or {R}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text: Crafted with genius, energized with madness.

card.name: Brass Squire
card.oracle_text: {T}: Attach target Equipment you control to target creature you control.
card.flavor_text:
"I admire it. Few pull off pluck and subservience at the same time."
—Ezuri, renegade leader

card.name: Voltaic Key
card.oracle_text: {1}, {T}: Untap target artifact.
card.flavor_text: The key did not work on a single lock, yet it opened many doors.

card.name: Mystic Remora
card.oracle_text:
Cumulative upkeep {1} (At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this permanent, then sacrifice it unless you pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.)
Whenever an opponent casts a noncreature spell, you may draw a card unless that player pays {4}.

card.name: Chromatic Star
card.oracle_text:
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.
When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Cyclonic Rift
card.oracle_text:
Return target nonland permanent you don't control to its owner's hand.
Overload {6}{U} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")
card.flavor_text: "Oh, *that's* what that switch does!"

card.name: Hammer of Nazahn
Jhoira, Weatherlight Captain
card.oracle_text: Whenever you cast a historic spell, draw a card. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)
card.flavor_text: As she took the wheel of the *Weatherlight* for the first time in a millennium, Jhoira knew she'd been right to restore the ship. Anything was possible now.

card.name: Trash for Treasure
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact.
Return target artifact card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: Goblins generally have two possessions: one per hand.

card.name: Blinkmoth Urn
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's first main phase, if this artifact is untapped, that player adds {C} for each artifact they control.
card.flavor_text: The vedalken embed such urns in their living artifact creations.

card.name: Etherium Sculptor
card.oracle_text: Artifact spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
card.flavor_text: The greatest masters of the craft abandon tools altogether, shaping metal with hand and mind alone.

card.name: Loxodon Warhammer
card.oracle_text:
Equipped creature gets +3/+0 and has trample and lifelink.
Equip {3}
card.flavor_text:
"A crafter must imbue her weapon with part of her soul—something the Phyrexians are incapable of doing."
—Melira, sylvok outcast

card.name: Fabricate
card.oracle_text: Search your library for an artifact card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "The secret to invention is to see something in your mind, then find where it hides in the world."

card.name: Painter's Servant
card.oracle_text:
As this creature enters, choose a color.
All cards that aren't on the battlefield, spells, and permanents are the chosen color in addition to their other colors.
card.flavor_text: It gathers hues from the twilight mist so that its master can paint a better world.

card.name: Isochron Scepter
card.oracle_text:
Imprint — When this artifact enters, you may exile an instant card with mana value 2 or less from your hand.
{2}, {T}: You may copy the exiled card. If you do, you may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Armillary Sphere
card.oracle_text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: The mysterious purpose of two of the rings had eluded Esper mages—until now.

card.name: Haunted Cloak
card.oracle_text:
Equipped creature has vigilance, trample, and haste.
Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)
card.flavor_text: Bear the weight of so many spirits and you'll surrender civility and restraint to savagery and instinct.

card.name: Ichor Wellspring
card.oracle_text: When this artifact enters or is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card.
card.flavor_text:
"Our glorious infection has taken hold."
—Elesh Norn, Grand Cenobite

card.name: Sword of the Animist
card.flavor_text: The blade glows only for Zendikar's chosen.

card.name: Seat of the Synod
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {U}.

card.name: Stormcarved Coast
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Darksteel Citadel
card.oracle_text:
Indestructible
{T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Enthusiastic Mechanaut
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Artifact spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
card.flavor_text: "Greetings, fellow inventors!" the akki shouted, attempting a friendly smile. To her dismay, the greeting was met only with shrieks and alarms being activated.

card.name: Spire of Industry
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. Activate only if you control an artifact.
card.flavor_text: A beacon of prosperity to some, a shadow of oppression to others.

card.name: Blackblade Reforged
card.flavor_text: It spilled the blood of one elder dragon. In Gideon's hands, it may yet taste another's.

card.set_name: Heads I Win, Tails You Lose
card.name: Great Furnace
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {R}.
card.flavor_text: Kuldotha, wellspring of molten metal, temple of the goblin horde.

card.name: Molten Tributary
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {U} or {R}.)
This land enters tapped.
card.flavor_text: Though dangerous, Shiv teems with both life and mana, making it a tempting destination for ambitious mages.

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: All Necrons bear the mark of the Triarch, a brand upon their living-metal skin that binds them to their dynasty.

card.name: Reliquary Tower
card.oracle_text:
You have no maximum hand size.
{T}: Add {C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Let the others bicker over their little worlds and stars. I have an empire of knowledge, and it encompasses all others."
—Trazyn the Infinite

card.name: Mind Stone
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.
card.flavor_text: During biotransference, the Necrontyr lost almost all individuality. What little remained was imprisoned within a living metal form.

card.name: Sculpting Steel
card.oracle_text: You may have this artifact enter as a copy of any artifact on the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: Necrodermis, the living metal from which all Necrons are made, is endlessly adaptive.

card.name: Myriad Landscape
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for up to two basic land cards that share a land type, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Sai, Master Thopterist
card.oracle_text:
Whenever you cast an artifact spell, create a 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature token with flying.
{1}{U}, Sacrifice two artifacts: Draw a card.
card.flavor_text: "Industry without artistry is just a fancy way to fill the junkyard."

card.name: Scrap Trawler
card.oracle_text: Whenever this creature dies or another artifact you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return to your hand target artifact card in your graveyard with lesser mana value.

card.name: Idol of Oblivion
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Draw a card. Activate only if you created a token this turn.
{8}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Create a 10/10 colorless Eldrazi creature token.
card.flavor_text: "Arise, great one, and cleanse the world of our enemies!"

card.name: Negate
card.oracle_text: Counter target noncreature spell.
card.flavor_text: Teferi gave them time. Karn gave them a chance. But it was Melira who paid the ultimate price to free Ajani from Phyrexia's grasp.

card.name: Field of Ruin
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Destroy target nonbasic land an opponent controls. Each player searches their library for a basic land card, puts it onto the battlefield, then shuffles.
card.flavor_text:
"There's some devilry at work in the Shire."
—Sam

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
card.name: Ioreth of the Healing House
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Untap another target permanent.
{T}: Untap two other target legendary creatures.
card.flavor_text: "I have been too busy with this and that to heed all the crying and shouting. All I hope is that those murdering devils do not come to this House and trouble the sick."

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Model? I'm insulted. It's by all reasonable metrics a fully functional planetary system, scaled down for easier study."
—Urza, to Tawnos

card.name: Reality Shift
card.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller manifests the top card of their library. (That player puts the top card of their library onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature. If it's a creature card, it can be turned face up any time for its mana cost.)

card.name: Resculpt
card.oracle_text: Exile target artifact or creature. Its controller creates a 4/4 blue and red Elemental creature token.
card.flavor_text: Critics were struck first by the elemental's surprising grace, and then by its fists.

card.name: Foundry Inspector
card.oracle_text: Artifact spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
card.flavor_text: Automaton inspectors ensure that the Consulate's stringent standards for mass production are upheld.

card.name: Reverse Engineer
card.oracle_text:
Improvise (Your artifacts can help cast this spell. Each artifact you tap after you're done activating mana abilities pays for {1}.)
Draw three cards.
card.flavor_text: The Hold, an illegal research facility in a derelict merchant ship, became a wellspring of renegade intelligence.

card.name: Fiery Islet
card.oracle_text:
{T}, Pay 1 life: Add {U} or {R}.
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Draw a card.
card.flavor_text:
"We'll use this ship as a battering ram to hit all of the others, creating a massive temporal reaction. Takes the ships, and all the Sontarans on Earth, out of existence. Huge temporal bang."
—Karvanista

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"New Vegas is more than a city—it's the remedy to mankind's derailment."
—Mr. House

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Worn Powerstone
card.oracle_text:
This artifact enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text:
"The strange energy source isn't cosmium after all, but some unidentifiable material that has leached cosmium residue from the walls. Could be dangerous. Could change everything."
—Oltec archaeological survey

card.name: Nettlecyst
Blasphemous Act
card.oracle_text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield.
Blasphemous Act deals 13 damage to each creature.
card.flavor_text: Everyone knew the bombs were coming. Everyone but the public.

card.name: Rogue's Passage
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.
card.flavor_text: The Railroad is an organization dedicated to freeing synths from the influence of the Institute. Their HQ is a secret location found by following the Freedom Trail.

card.name: Basilisk Collar
card.oracle_text:
Equipped creature has deathtouch and lifelink. (Any amount of damage it deals to a creature is enough to destroy it. Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)
card.flavor_text: A mark of companionship, not subservience.

card.name: Champion's Helm
Swiftfoot Boots
card.oracle_text:
Equipped creature has hexproof and haste. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control. It can attack and {T} no matter when it came under your control.)
Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)
card.flavor_text: "I don't need brakes. I usually find that if something stops me, it's interesting enough to stop for."

card.name: Tomb Trawler
card.oracle_text: {2}: Put target card from your graveyard on the bottom of your library.
card.flavor_text:
"Dying is common on Thunder Junction. Resting in peace is a much rarer commodity."
—Baron Bertram Graywater

card.name: Simulacrum Synthesizer
card.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, scry 2.
Whenever another artifact you control with mana value 3 or greater enters, create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with "This token gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control."

card.oracle_text:
Whenever you sacrifice this artifact or another artifact, you may pay {2}. If you do, at the beginning of the next end step, create a token that's a copy of that artifact.

card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{U/R}, {T}: Add {U}{U}, {U}{R}, or {R}{R}.
card.flavor_text: Travelers bathe in the falls to wash away curses from the pucas who lurk nearby.

card.name: Izzet Signet
card.flavor_text: The Izzet signet is redesigned often, each time becoming closer to a vanity portrait of Niv-Mizzet.

card.name: Shivan Reef
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}. This land deals 1 damage to you.
card.flavor_text: The boiling seas around Shiv provided a welcome layer of protection for the reclaimed Mana Rig.

card.name: Sulfur Falls
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control an Island or a Mountain.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.
card.flavor_text:
"We have inherited the mysteries of the Thran, but few of the answers."
—Jhoira

card.name: Arcane Denial
card.oracle_text:
Counter target spell. Its controller may draw up to two cards at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.
You draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.

Draw X cards. If X is 10 or more, instead shuffle your graveyard into your library, draw X cards, untap up to five lands, and you have no maximum hand size for the rest of the game.

card.name: Sword of Light and Shadow
Ferrous Lake
card.flavor_text: Stability and volatility churn together, creating beauty and danger both.

card.name: Commander's Plate
card.flavor_text: Armor changes, but Iron Man endures.

card.oracle_text:

{T}: Add {C}.
{1}{U}, {T}: Put target artifact card from your graveyard on top of your library.
card.flavor_text:

—Saheeli Rai
